kennelTipLean.note: The Kennel's cooked. No one's tipping this team after the Dolphins shellacking — most blokes are just hoping we keep it under 30.

debates.question: Tracey's named at 1 — does he last the full 80 or get yanked early?
debates.kennel: The Tracey?Time to go thread is 198 replies of pure venom after Friday.

options.label: Shifted off fullback mid-game (Crichton or Burton goes back)

debates.question: Where does the Dogs' first try come from?
debates.kennel: After 75% completion last week the bar is on the floor — even scoring first feels optimistic.

options.label: Burton or Galvin set play / kick
Forward crash off a Hayward dart
Outside back off a broken-field scramble

trivia.question: What year did the Bulldogs win their most recent NRL premiership?
trivia.explainer: Canterbury beat the Roosters 16-13 in the 2004 Grand Final — still the club's last title.

recap.question: Who racked up the most tackles for the Dogs against the Dolphins?
recap.explainer: Sitili put on 42 tackles — only bloke really earning his coin while the rest of the side coughed up 40 missed tackles.

washup.headline: 12-44 at Suncorp and the wheels aren't just off — they're rolling down Caxton Street.
washup.vibe: Got cooked by the Dolphins. 40 missed tackles, 10 errors, 75% completion — it's just bad footy. Salmon got one early, Critta got one back, then Isaako put on a four-pointer hat-trick and the bench just unloaded. Sitting 13th after 10 rounds with Gus, Ciro and half the squad on the chopping block in the forums.
washup.kennelSummary: The Kennel went into full meltdown — Tracey's getting buried, Salmon at 13 is the running joke, and there's a Ciraldo-sack thread that spawned during the second half. Nate DAWG literally predicted the meltdown timing to the minute.

kennelHotTakes.quote: That is the most pathetic fullback performance I have seen from a Bulldogs fullback.
kennelHotTakes.author: Imposter404

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 11 vs Sharks Friday 6pm Suncorp (Magic Round)
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Gameday thread's already a mess — Mr Shhh tapped out at Tracey's name, half the thread reckons Xerri needs to mark Talakai, the other half is bagging the AI team graphic.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Mitch Woods
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: 187 replies of 'play him now' vs 'he's not even fit'. Some reckon Conti's the better Reggies call anyway. Classic Kennel halves chaos.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Tracey?Time to go
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Tracey's getting absolutely flayed — 'most pathetic fullback performance' according to one bloke, with calls to swap him for Bevan French. Kempsey Dog wants him on a plane to Super League.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Is Gus actually the real problem?
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Gus on trial now too. Glenn L's calling himself Nostradamus, silva reckons Barrett's too soft, and BulldogsNation's threatening that if Baz survives the season Gus is gone too.
